entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important grain legume in Ethiopia used for food protein, income generation, and soil fertility restoration

entities.name: FABA BEAN
entities.description: A grain legume grown in Ethiopia, significant in terms of area coverage and production

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: A grain legume grown in Ethiopia, significant in terms of area coverage and production

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study on chickpea seed quality and farmer skills was conducted

entities.name: EAST SHOWA ZONE
entities.description: The specific zone in Ethiopia where the research was carried out

entities.name: ADA
entities.description: A representative district in the major chickpea growing area of East Showa Zone

entities.name: LUME
entities.description: A representative district in the major chickpea growing area of East Showa Zone

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics of seeds that determine their suitability for production and productivity

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process and associated technologies used to produce quality seeds

entities.name: SEED QUALITY TEST
entities.description: A mandatory process within seed production systems to verify seed quality

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: A major challenge that limits the production of quality chickpea seeds

entities.name: ARERTI
entities.description: A dominant and widely grown variety of chickpea in the study districts

entities.name: HABRU
entities.description: A dominant and widely grown variety of chickpea in the study districts

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Seed producers in Ethiopia whose experiences and perceptions of seed quality were investigated

entities.name: SEED HEALTH
entities.description: The state of seeds being free from disease, which is a focus for future regulatory work
